tests.name: platform_module_present
tests.details: docs/platform-modules/ directory present but EMPTY; framework has docs/platform-modules/mcp-server.md (hyphen) but verify-install.sh expects mcp_server.md (underscore) and init.sh did not copy any module file

tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: Running init.sh from $FRAMEWORK exits 1 with 'Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo' message — PR #18 fix verified

framework_bugs.summary: release.yml workflow not created by init.sh for personal/mcp_server/standard
framework_bugs.reproduction: bash $FRAMEWORK/init.sh --non-interactive --project uat-agent-59 --platform mcp_server --track standard --deployment personal --language python --git-host other --remote-url https://example.com/fake.git --branch-protection-attested --visibility private --allow-existing-dir; ls .github/workflows/
framework_bugs.expected: .github/workflows/release.yml created alongside ci.yml (per Section A test case release_workflow_created)
framework_bugs.actual: Only ci.yml created; release.yml missing. upgrade-project.sh post-upgrade verification emits '[WARN] Release pipeline missing (.github/workflows/release.yml)'.

framework_bugs.summary: Platform module file not copied into project on init
framework_bugs.expected: docs/platform-modules/mcp_server.md (or mcp-server.md) copied into project from framework
framework_bugs.actual: docs/platform-modules/ directory created but empty. Framework source has docs/platform-modules/mcp-server.md (hyphenated) but verify-install.sh and init.sh expect mcp_server.md (underscored) — naming mismatch + missing copy step. verify-install.sh emits manual action: 'Platform module (mcp_server.md) missing → Copy from orchestrator: docs/platform-modules/mcp_server.md' — but the source file is named mcp-server.md.

documentation_gaps.gap: Platform module filename inconsistency: framework ships docs/platform-modules/mcp-server.md (hyphen) but verify-install.sh advises copying mcp_server.md (underscore). Either rename source file or fix verify-install.sh hint.

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: tests_written, tests_verified_failing, implemented, security_audit, documentation_updated, feature_recorded all OK in sequence

tests.name: feature_committed
tests.details: git commit feat(uat-1) succeeded after all 5 build_loop steps

tests.name: test_gate_record_feature
tests.details: test-gate.sh --record-feature uat-feat-1 OK; build-progress.json features_completed includes 'uat-feat-1'

tests.name: build_loop_resets_after_feature_recorded
tests.details: After --complete-step build_loop:feature_recorded, .build_loop.feature reset to null (BL-006 grace window working)

tests.name: upgrade_command_exits_zero
tests.details: Per runbook command 'intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment private_poc' from PROJECT_DIR: exits 1 with 'Error: PROJECT_INTAKE.md not found.' This is U-G regression confirmation — PROJECT_ROOT in intake-wizard.sh is hardcoded to $SCRIPT_DIR/.. (the framework parent), not the cwd. As a fallback I tried 'upgrade-project.sh --deployment private_poc' which exits 1 with '[FAIL] Invalid target deployment: private_poc (must be: personal, organizational)'. Only 'upgrade-project.sh --deployment organizational' works — but that does not equal upgrading to private_poc.

tests.name: process_state_preserved
tests.details: build-progress.json features_completed still ['uat-feat-1']; process-state.json build_loop history preserved (current loop reset normally after feature_recorded)

tests.name: new_required_artifacts_listed
tests.details: Upgrade output lists: 'Next steps for organizational deployment: 1. Fill in Pre-Phase 0 organizational pre-conditions in APPROVAL_LOG.md; 2. Complete Section 8 of PROJECT_INTAKE.md (governance pre-flight); 3. Assign approval authorities for each phase gate'

tests.name: pending_approval_sentinel_respected
tests.details: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json then ran upgrade-project.sh --deployment organizational. Exit 1 with '[FAIL] upgrade blocked — pending user decision.' PR #17 U-F fix verified.

tests.name: upgrade_changelog_present_in_script
tests.details: scripts/upgrade-project.sh header (lines 12, 16) mentions both 'BL-006 (2026-04-24)' and 'BL-015 (2026-04-25)' changelog entries

tests.name: no_template_placeholders_in_output
tests.details: grep -E '__PROJECT_NAME__|__PLATFORM__|__LANGUAGE__|__TRACK__' on full upgrade log returned no matches

tests.name: deployment_field_written_on_upgrade
tests.details: U-J confirmation: After 'upgrade-project.sh --deployment organizational' completes successfully and announces 'Deployment: personal -> organizational', .claude/phase-state.json .deployment field still reads 'personal' and .poc_mode is null. Banner says success, file state unchanged.

framework_bugs.summary: U-G confirmation: intake-wizard.sh PROJECT_ROOT hardcoded to framework, blocks runbook upgrade path
framework_bugs.expected: Wizard resolves PROJECT_ROOT from cwd or $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR and proceeds with upgrade
framework_bugs.actual: Exits 1 with 'Error: PROJECT_INTAKE.md not found. Run this script from a Solo Orchestrator project directory.' Code at intake-wizard.sh:20 sets PROJECT_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/.." && pwd)" so it always points to the framework parent — even when invoked from inside a real project. Comment at line 16-17 explicitly acknowledges this is U-G deferred to Batch 3.

framework_bugs.summary: intake-wizard --upgrade-deployment rejects POC scenario values; cannot reach private_poc target
framework_bugs.expected: Per runbook Section F, the upgrade flow for personal->private_poc is 'intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment private_poc'. This should set deployment=organizational and gov_mode/poc_mode=private_poc.
framework_bugs.actual: intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment only accepts personal|organizational (per its error msg at line 1586). It exec's upgrade-project.sh --deployment which itself only accepts personal|organizational ('[FAIL] Invalid target deployment: private_poc'). There is NO scripted path from personal/non-POC to private_poc. The only POC transitions supported are private_poc->sponsored_poc (--to-sponsored-poc) and POC->production (--to-production). Personal->private_poc requires a manual two-step (deployment=organizational, then somehow set poc_mode), and even step 1 has bug U-J below.

framework_bugs.summary: U-J confirmation: deployment field not written to phase-state.json on upgrade-project.sh --deployment organizational
framework_bugs.expected: phase-state.json .deployment = 'organizational' after a successful 'personal -> organizational' upgrade banner
framework_bugs.actual: phase-state.json .deployment still reads 'personal' (and .poc_mode still null) even though script logs '[OK] Updated phase-state.json' and final banner says 'Deployment: personal -> organizational'. Only the timestamp field .last_upgrade is added. tool-preferences.json .track also reads null after the same upgrade reports 'Updated track to standard in tool-preferences.json'.

documentation_gaps.gap: Runbook Section F says case '{UPGRADE_TO}' in private_poc|sponsored_poc) bash intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment {TARGET_DEPLOYMENT}; but intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment only accepts personal|organizational. Either runbook should clarify the upgrade path personal->private_poc is unsupported, or the script needs new flags.
documentation_gaps.where: RUNBOOK.md Section F lines 286-294 vs scripts/intake-wizard.sh line 1538 / 1586

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: grep on committed files returned only documentation examples (e.g., 'BITBUCKET_APP_PASSWORD="your-app-password"' in cli-setup-addendum.md) — no real secrets

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: N/A — no FORCE/reset events occurred during run; .claude/process-audit.log absent (correct)

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD = d66e8f2 (matches setup snapshot). git status --short shows only pre-existing untracked entries (.claude/ and Reports/uat-2026-04-26/) which were untracked before this agent ran. Framework-self guard active.

summary: Baseline init OK and PR #17/#18/#19 fixes verified, but Section F upgrade fails: U-G blocks runbook's intake-wizard path (PROJECT_INTAKE.md not found from project dir), and even bypassing to upgrade-project.sh exposes the High bug that no scripted path exists from personal to private_poc plus U-J (deployment field not actually written). Section G clean, Phase 0 had two Medium issues (release.yml not created, platform module not copied + filename inconsistency mcp-server.md vs mcp_server.md).
